uin_code.source_quote: UIN: ACKHLIP27040V012627 Web: www.acko.com/gi | Toll Free: 1800 266 2256

grace_period.source_quote: Grace period (renewal + instalments) • For instalment premium: ▪ 15 days grace for monthly instalments ▪ 30 days grace for quarterly/half-yearly/annual instalments ▪ Coverage continues during the grace

free_look_period.source_quote: Free look period • 30 days from date of receipt of policy to review the terms and conditions of the Policy, and to return the same if not acceptable (only at inception, not renewals/porting).

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote: 3.1.3. 30-day waiting period (Not applicable for this plan) • Expenses for treatment of any illness within 30 days from first policy commencement excluded, except accidents.

pre_hospitalization_days.source_quote: In the pre-hospitalization period up to 60 days, and • In the post-hospitalization period up to 180 days, only if the related hospitalization/day care claim is admissible.

post_hospitalization_days.source_quote: In the pre-hospitalization period up to 60 days, and • In the post-hospitalization period up to 180 days, only if the related hospitalization/day care claim is admissible.

day_care_treatments_count.source_note: Per insurer baseline (Acko covers all day-care procedures up to SI; 500+ procedures)

network_hospital_count.source_note: ACKO has 11,500+ cashless hospitals across India (insurer's cashless landing page, scraped 2026-05-15)

ayush_coverage.source_quote: If any insured under this policy undergoes Day Care Treatment (including AYUSH treatment) in a Hospital/Nursing Home/Day Care Centre, we cover the expenses.

maternity_coverage.source_quote: Maternity Excluded: • childbirth (incl. complicated delivery/C-section) and pre/post hospitalization • miscarriage (unless due to accident) • lawful medical termination

organ_donor_expenses.source_quote: Organ Donor Expenses- Part of base SI If anyone insured requires organ transplant, we cover the organ donor's in-patient hospitalization expenses for harvesting the organ within the Sum insured of the insured. domiciliary_treatment.source_quote: Domiciliary Treatment (Domiciliary Hospitalization)- Part of base SI We cover costs of such domiciliary hospitalization if anyone insured takes treatment at home (instead of a hospital) due to: Inability to be moved, OR Non-availability of hospital beds. Conditions: Must continue
